# Dependencies: Form 1040 Lines 19 + 28 — Schedule 8812 (CTC + ODC + ACTC) (2025)

> Authoritative source: `lines/19.md`. Re-authored 2026-06-14.
>
> **Implementation site:** `computeSchedule8812()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:30739` (~380 lines; Part I + Part II-A + Part II-B). Call site at `prepare()` line 1817 (after Form 8863 + EIC pre-set; before `finalizeSchedule3Totals`). Output wiring at `prepare()` lines 1348 (line 19) + 1355 (line 28). MFS spouse Form 2555 leak guarded at the call site (19 #1, 2026-05-14).
>
> **2025 OBBBA constants:** CTC $2,200/child + ACTC $1,700/child + 3-children trigger $5,100 (= 3 × $1,700). G9 fix: MFJ ITIN block fires only when **both** spouses have ITINs. G11 fix: bona fide PR residents bypass the 3-children gate.

## 1. Direct Inputs

| Input | Source | Backend field | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Form1040.line11b` | `computeAGI()` | `form1040.taxAndCredits.adjustments.line11b...` | Schedule 8812 line 1 (AGI base) |
| Form 2555 taxpayer exclusions | `computeForm2555()` | `Form2555.foreignEarnedIncomeExclusion` + `.housingExclusionAmount` | Schedule 8812 line 2b |
| Form 2555 spouse exclusions | `computeForm2555()` | same on spouse Form 2555 (**MFS-shadowed by 19 #1**) | Schedule 8812 line 2b |
| Filing status | `filing-status` personal form | `filingStatus` (normalized) | Schedule 8812 line 9 threshold ($400k MFJ / $200k others including QSS) |
| Per-dependent CTC checkbox | `identification-dependent` | `DependentRecord.qualifiesForCTC()` | Schedule 8812 line 4 (count) |
| Per-dependent ODC checkbox | `identification-dependent` | `DependentRecord.qualifiesForODC()` | Schedule 8812 line 6 (count) |
| Identification taxpayer SSN/ITIN | `identification-taxpayer` | tax ID type/digits | 2025 SSN/ITIN gate (G7, G9) |
| Identification spouse SSN/ITIN | `identification-spouse` | tax ID type/digits | MFJ both-ITIN gate (G9) |
| `TaxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | `computeLine18()` | `form1040.taxAndCredits.totalTaxBeforeCredits` | CLW-A line 1 (post-FTC refresh per G-new-1) |
| `Schedule3.foreignTaxCredit` | `applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()` | `nc.foreignTaxCredit` | CLW-A line 2 subtraction |
| `Schedule3.childDependentCareCredit` | `finalizeForm2441PartII()` | `nc.childDependentCareCredit` | CLW-A line 2 subtraction |
| `Schedule3.educationCredits` | `applyForm8863ToSchedule3()` | `nc.educationCredits` | CLW-A line 2 (must run BEFORE Schedule 8812 — G1 order) |
| `Schedule3.retirementSavingsContributionsCredit` | `applyForm8880ToSchedule3()` | `nc.retirementSavingsContributionsCredit` | CLW-A line 2 subtraction |
| `Schedule3.elderlyDisabledCredit` | `applyScheduleRToSchedule3()` | `nc.elderlyDisabledCredit` | CLW-A line 2 subtraction |
| `Income.totalWages` | `buildIncome()` | `form1040.income.totalWages` (line 1z) | Schedule 8812 line 18a (earned income base) |
| `Income.nontaxableCombatPayElection` | `buildIncome()` | `form1040.income.nontaxableCombatPayElection` | Schedule 8812 line 18a (when elected) |
| Form 2555 filed flag | derived | `form2555Taxpayer != null \|\| form2555Spouse != null` (**MFS-shadowed**) | ACTC block gate (IRC §24(d)(5)(B)) |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer.electsNoActc` | personal form | `ctcScreening.electsNoActc` | G4 ACTC opt-out (no IRS basis; conservative design decision) |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer.ctcPreviouslyDenied` | personal form | `ctcScreening.ctcPreviouslyDenied` | Form 8862 gate trigger |
| `ctc-actc-screening-taxpayer.isBonafidePuertoRicoResident` | personal form | `ctcScreening.isBonafidePuertoRicoResident` | G11 Part II-B PR bypass |
| `Form8862.claimsCTC` + `.ctcEligible` | `computeForm8862()` | `form8862.claimsCTC`, `.ctcEligible` | Form 8862 recertification gate |
| W-2 box 4 (`socialSecurityTaxWithheldAmount`) | w-2 statement entries | `w2.socialSecurityTaxWithheldAmount` | Part II-B line 21 |
| `Schedule2.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareTaxOnWages` | Schedule 2 line 5 | `schedule2.otherTaxes.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareTaxOnWages` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `Schedule2.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax` | Schedule 2 line 6 | `schedule2.otherTaxes.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `Schedule2.additionalMedicareTax` | Schedule 2 line 13 | `schedule2.otherTaxes.additionalMedicareTax` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `Schedule1.line15` | SE tax (deferred) | `schedule1.line15` | Part II-B line 22 |
| `Payments.earnedIncomeCredit` | `computeLine27aEIC()` | `form1040.payments.earnedIncomeCredit` | Part II-B line 24 — **pre-set BEFORE Schedule 8812** (G1 fix 2026-04-18) |
| `Payments.americanOpportunityCredit` | `computeForm8863()` | `form1040.payments.americanOpportunityCredit` | Part II-B line 24 — **pre-set BEFORE Schedule 8812** (G1 fix) |

## 2. Conditional Inputs

| Condition | Input activated |
|---|---|
| Form 2555 filed (taxpayer; spouse MFS-shadowed) | `line2b += foreignEarnedIncomeExclusion + housingExclusionAmount`; ACTC blocked |
| MFJ filing status | Phase-out threshold = $400,000 (otherwise $200k including QSS) |
| `electsNoActc = true` | `line27 = 0`; computation short-circuits (G4) |
| `ctcPreviouslyDenied = true` AND (Form 8862 absent OR `!claimsCTC`) | Returns all zeros + emits `FORM_8862_CTC_REQUIRED` blocking flag |
| Part II-B trigger (`line16b ≥ $5,100`) OR `isBonafidePuertoRicoResident` | W-2 box 4, Schedule 2 lines 5/6/13, Schedule 1 line 15 read for lines 21/22 |
| `electCombatPay = true` | `line18a += nontaxableCombatPayElection` |
| MFJ with **both** spouses on ITINs (G9) | CTC + ACTC blocked (one valid SSN suffices on MFJ) |

## 3. Outputs

| Output field | Model | Type | Consumer |
|---|---|---|---|
| `TaxAndCredits.childTaxCredit` | `form1040.taxAndCredits` | `BigDecimal` | Form 1040 line 19 (always-set convention) |
| `Payments.additionalChildTaxCredit` | `form1040.payments` | `BigDecimal` | Form 1040 line 28 (null-when-zero convention) |
| `Schedule8812` (full model — Parts I + II-A + II-B + CLW-A) | `TaxReturnComputation.schedule8812` | `Schedule8812` | Tax return view + PDF export |
| `Dependent.childTaxCreditEligible` | `Form1040.header.dependents[n]` | `Boolean` | Per-dependent CTC checkbox on Form 1040 page 1 |
| `Dependent.otherDependentCreditEligible` | `Form1040.header.dependents[n]` | `Boolean` | Per-dependent ODC checkbox on Form 1040 page 1 |

Mutual exclusion enforced — a dependent cannot have both checkboxes set.

## 4. PDF Fields

| Form | CSV key | Description |
|---|---|---|
| Form 1040 page 2 | `line19_child_tax_credit_or_other_dependents_credit` | Line 19 CTC + ODC nonrefundable amount |
| Form 1040 page 2 | `line28_additional_child_tax_credit` | Line 28 refundable ACTC amount |
| Form 1040 page 2 | `unmapped_c2_14_0` | ACTC opt-out checkbox (when `electsNoActc=true`) |
| Form 1040 page 1 | `dependent1_child_tax_credit` … `dependent4_child_tax_credit` | Per-dependent CTC checkbox |
| Form 1040 page 1 | `dependent1_credit_for_other_dependents` … `dependent4_credit_for_other_dependents` | Per-dependent ODC checkbox |
| Schedule 8812 | `f1_3[0]`…`f1_14[0]` | Part I lines 3–14 |
| Schedule 8812 | `f1_15[0]`…`f1_19[0]` | Part II-A lines 16a–19 |
| Schedule 8812 page 2 | `f2_1[0]`…`f2_3[0]` | Lines 20, 21, 27 |

Source: `f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv`, `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts`, `form-tax-return-schedule8812.component.ts`.

## 5. Compute Order

```text
computeLine18()                                           → totalTaxBeforeCredits (post-FTC refresh)
        ↓
finalizeForm2441PartII()                                  → Schedule3.childDependentCareCredit
        ↓
computeForm1116() + applyForeignTaxCreditToSchedule3()    → Schedule3.foreignTaxCredit (+ correctLine17ForFtc refresh)
        ↓
applyForm8863ToSchedule3()                                → Schedule3.educationCredits  (★ G1 — must precede 8812)
                                                          + Payments.americanOpportunityCredit  (refundable AOTC pre-set)
        ↓
computeLine27aEIC()                                       → Payments.earnedIncomeCredit  (pre-set before 8812 — G1)
        ↓
applyForm8880ToSchedule3()                                → Schedule3.retirementSavingsContributionsCredit
        ↓
computeSchedule8812()    at prepare() line 1817
    ├── Form 8862 gate (ctcPreviouslyDenied → FORM_8862_CTC_REQUIRED)
    ├── Part I lines 1-14 (MAGI, phaseout, line 13 = CLW-A, line 14 = min(line12, line13))
    ├── Part II-A lines 16a-20 (line16b = line4 × 1700; line 20 = (line18a − 2500) × 0.15)
    ├── Part II-B routing (line16b ≥ 5100 OR isBonafidePuertoRicoResident → line 21-27)
    └── Outputs:
            TaxAndCredits.childTaxCredit       = Schedule8812.line14   (Form 1040 line 19)
            Payments.additionalChildTaxCredit  = Schedule8812.line27   (Form 1040 line 28)
        ↓
finalizeSchedule3Totals()  +  computeLine20ThroughLine24() (line 21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20))
```

## 6. Downstream Consumers

| Consumer | Method | How it uses the output |
|---|---|---|
| Line 21 total credits | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line21 = nz(line19) + nz(line20)` |
| Line 22 tax-after-credits | `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line22 = max(0, line18 − line21)` |
| Line 32 refundable subtotal | `computeLine31ThroughLine38()` | Line 28 included in refundable credits subtotal |
| PDF export line 19 | `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | `values['line19_...'] = childTaxCredit` |
| PDF export line 28 | `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | `values['line28_...'] = additionalChildTaxCredit` |

## 7. 2025 Tax Constants

| Constant | 2025 value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| CTC per qualifying child | $2,200 | OBBBA + Rev. Proc. 2024-40 §3.08 |
| ODC per qualifying dependent | $500 | unchanged |
| ACTC maximum per qualifying child | $1,700 | OBBBA |
| Phase-out threshold — MFJ | $400,000 | IRC §24(b)(2) |
| Phase-out threshold — all others (incl. QSS) | $200,000 | IRC §24(b)(2) |
| Phase-out rate | $50 per $1,000 (or part of $1,000) | IRC §24(b)(1) |
| ACTC earned-income floor | $2,500 | IRC §24(d)(1)(B) |
| ACTC rate | 15% | IRC §24(d)(1)(B)(ii) |
| Part II-B 3-children trigger | $5,100 (= 3 × $1,700) | computed |

## 8. Gaps

| # | Description | Severity | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| G1 | Part II-B line 24 = 0 due to compute ordering (EIC + AOTC pre-set missing) | HIGH | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G2 | Schedule 8812 sidebar visibility — should be conditional on line14/line27 | LOW | **Fixed** — conditional push in `shell.component.ts` 2026-04-18 |
| G4 | `electsNoActc` user election has no IRS basis for 2025 | LOW | **Closed — accepted design decision** 2026-04-18 |
| G5 | `line10PhaseOutExcess` stores rounded excess, not raw excess (PDF display) | LOW | **Fixed 2026-04-18** |
| G6 | CLW-A missing Schedule 3 lines 5b, 6f, 6, 6m (unimplemented forms) | LOW | **Open — deferred by design** |
| G7 | 2025 SSN/ITIN claimant rule for CTC/ACTC | HIGH | **Fixed** — 9-leading-digit ITIN pattern |
| G9 | MFJ ITIN block — must fire only when **both** spouses have ITINs | MEDIUM | **Fixed** |
| G11 | Part II-B 3-children gate must bypass for bona fide PR residents | MEDIUM | **Fixed** |
| MFS Form 2555 spouse leak (line 2b + `hasFiling2555`) | HIGH | **Fixed 2026-05-14** (19 #1 — null-shadow at call site line 1777) |
